phase_gate_notes: Do not rename existing route names.
The required safe branch remained active throughout Phase 5 implementation.
Phase 5 implementation began after the autopilot-only checkpoint `12187ebebb3a003dc6b20c7cbc979a305fe5f280` restored a clean preflight state.
Sandbox-only shurjoPay initiation, return handling, IPN scaffolding, verification, manual-bank review, receipt issuance, and invoice linkage are now implemented in Laravel.
Live payment activation, live merchant-panel changes, and the current WordPress-controlled live IPN routing remain out of scope and untouched.
shurjoPay authenticity is treated as verify-API based because the official docs available to this thread did not expose a separate callback signature secret for sandbox use.
Canonical posting remains scaffolded but disabled by default until an operator-approved account mapping exists; this preserves existing reporting and accounting behavior during sandbox-only work.
Donor online payments remain out of scope because the repository still lacks a dedicated donor payable model.
